#OPEC+ output fell to 33.13 million bpd in May, according to OPEC data, from 42.77 million bpd in February. It began ​to recover in June thanks to #US efforts to help the #UAE and other OPEC+ nations export more #oil, but is still below pre-#war levels.

OPEC+ just raised output for the 5th straight month—despite crude prices tumbling 20% in a month. 

They’re not stupid. They’re a cartel. 

This isn’t about supply. It’s about control. 

Weak hands get shaken out, prices stabilize, and the toll booth stays open.
